title: Refugee Health Service Access Gaps In Host Countries
summary: Build a verified workflow for measuring refugee health service access gaps relative to host populations, linking UNHCR health data, national health-system data, and refugee-population data.
why_it_matters: Build a verified workflow for measuring refugee health service access gaps relative to host populations, linking UNHCR health data, national health-system data, and refugee-population data.

success_metrics.target: Every claim links dated evidence with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
